diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,181 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+- Destination: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
+- Source Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git
+- Benchmark Task: routing-read-write-ledger
+- Date: 2026-06-23
+- Scope: Complete enumeration and lightweight annotation of Hono routing system source files
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that imports and instantiates the default router stack (SmartRouter containing RegExpRouter and TrieRouter)
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Simple note: 34 lines, exports Hono class with SmartRouter as fallback using [RegExpRouter, TrieRouter]
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base class with core request handling, composed handler system, method chaining (get/post/delete etc), and router integration
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Env, FetchEventLike, Handler, NotFoundHandler, compose, getPath, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Simple note: 545 lines, contains #dispatch, #handleError, #clone, #addRoute, request/fetch/mount/onError/notFound methods
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router class
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation using compiled regex patterns for path matching with wildcard and parameter support
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams
+- Simple note: 60 lines, converts paths to regex with /:param syntax, matches routes via compiled patterns
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router class
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation with linear iteration over routes, supports wildcards and parameters with manual string matching
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Params, Result, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams
+- Simple note: 144 lines, no precompiled regex, iterates routes sequentially, handles /:label and * patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter including PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 7 lines, exports router classes and prepared-router utilities
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter implementation using Trie with regex generation, builds matcher from preprocessed routes
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, ParamIndexMap, Matcher, Trie, Node, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, match, emptyParam, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, PATH_ERROR, handlerData, staticMap
+- Simple note: 252 lines, two-phase add/match with matcher building, supports wildcards and parameterized paths
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Matcher interface and match function shared by RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match
+- Simple note: 33 lines, exports match function that builds and caches matchers, returns [[handlers, stash]]
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter enabling router serialization with precomputed matcher state
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Matcher, RelocateMap, ConstructorParameters
+- Simple note: 165 lines, stores prebuilt matchers and relocateMap for faster runtime without re-processing routes
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class implementing trie structure with regex fragment building for path patterns
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, regExpMetaChars, compareKey
+- Simple note: 162 lines, trie node with children and #index, builds regexp strings, handles :label patterns and wildcards
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class for constructing path tree and generating final regular expressions
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, groups, tokens, regexp, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap
+- Simple note: 74 lines, wraps Node insertion, builds final RegExp with capture-to-handler mapping
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router class
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: SmartRouter that orchestrates multiple routers, selects single active router per request for performance
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter
+- Simple note: 70 lines, tries routers in sequence, caches winning router, sets name to "SmartRouter + <active>"
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router class
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter wrapper delegating insert/search to Node instance
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter
+- Simple note: 28 lines, simple wrapper class around Node, provides standard Router interface
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-router Node implementation with method-based routing and pattern matching
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitRoutingPath, splitPath, emptyParams, hasChildren, possibleKeys, score
+- Simple note: 234 lines, uses BFS for search, stores methods per node, handles wildcards and named parameters
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Node class including basic usage, named parameters, wildcards, regex, sort order, multi
